sections.title: Before talking to Rupert the Beard and before Grim Tales

lines.speaker: Miazrqa
lines.text: Oh, hello there. I'm afraid I don't have time to talk right now. I'm rather busy. Come back some other time please.

sections.title: After talking to Rupert the Beard and before Grim Tales

lines.speaker: Miazrqa
lines.text: Who am I? Why, how impertinent! I am a princess and I will be spoken to like one. Now be off with you. I have no time for scruffy adventurers like yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I notice there is a dwarf up in the tower there. Why is he up there?

lines.speaker: Miazrqa
lines.text: I do believe that is none of your business, young scallyrumpit! Now kindly leave.

lines.speaker: Miazrqa
lines.text: Thanks again for finding my pendant. I felt so lost without it.
